{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Blood Icon
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Blood Icon]] is an icon that resonates with truth.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11">''Dreadgod'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Blood Icon]] is an icon that [[Sages]] are tied to.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
